reviews.review_description:
This construction game is a fun discovery.
The goal is simple: have fun building marble runs.
This brings to life a ballet of marbles that race, spin, and interact with our decorations and obstacles.
The interface is well explained via the tutorial, and we're immediately immersed in building our first track.
Then we choose the starting points for the marbles and their colors. We roll, and the show begins!
My french video review: https://youtu.be/HD_0b6dYyGA
Puzzles are solved at my own way, physics is quite close to reality, fun and brain work :)
Glitchy. The spawners wouldn’t work, I got gliched in the “pause screen”, and it would delete most of the stuff I had!

reviews.review_title: Not a perfect game but def worth to try
reviews.review_description: Ok, so basically this game is an MR sandbox which let player can build marble tracks with their own idea. To me the most good part is I dont need to speed tons of time finding pieces in real world and build them. Instead with those variety of track pieces now I can build a fantasy tracks and let my child watch it run. Fun and useful product for me, just keep going for more themes.

Marblecraft is pure creative joy in VR — a nostalgic return to childhood where building marble circuits in the sand becomes an immersive, endlessly satisfying experience. With just a few clicks, you unlock a massive toolbox: ramps, loops, boosters, decorative items, and everything you need to bring your marble tracks to life.

Every detail has been carefully thought through — from the launch angle and marble speed to release timing and frequency. The ease of editing and swapping pieces means your builds are never locked in; you can reshape and evolve your creations in seconds. It’s a sandbox that invites experimentation and rewards imagination.

Whether you’re designing simple paths or wild contraptions, the experience is intuitive, relaxing, and deeply fulfilling. And with the studio actively engaging with the community and already teasing a full campaign mode, it’s clear Marblecraft is just getting started.

This is VR at its best: creative, playful, and limitless. A must-have for dreamers, tinkerers, and anyone craving a dose of tactile fun.

You might be saying to yourself, what is a crappy internet celebrity like Rok doing here in a written review review? Doesn't he just make reviews in video form? If you answered yes to any of those questions, why were you taking the time to do that and not downloading Marblecraft already? See, yet another question, when all we want is answers. Answers that scream this game is some great mixed reality fun that the developers keep showing nothing but love to in the development process.

Great play, great fun. Well worth the price of admission for any and all lovers of mixed reality. And marble tracks. You really should love marbles and making tracks for them to go down if you get this one. Just sayin'.

This game reminds me so much of playing with marbles as a kid. I would set out random household items and bits of scrap wood into a makeshift run. 

This game gives you all the tools to get your creativity rolling! Check it out if you like free form gaming.

Marblecraft is an absolute masterpiece that has completely blown me away! From the moment I entered this enchanting marble fantasy world, I was hooked. The ability to build my own marble world using diverse modules is a dream come true for anyone with a creative spark. It’s like having a limitless sandbox where I can let my imagination run wild.

The thrilling marble races on the tracks are an adrenaline rush, and watching the marbles dance in sync with the music is pure magic. It’s a visual and auditory treat that never gets old. And the opportunity to collaborate with marble crafters from around the globe and share our creations adds a whole new level of excitement and community. I’ve made so many amazing discoveries and connections through this platform.

I’ve spent hours upon hours exploring, creating, and capturing incredible marble moments, and I can’t get enough. Marblecraft truly offers endless possibilities and delivers an immersive experience like no other. It’s hands down the best marble - themed game I’ve ever played, and I wholeheartedly give it a well - deserved 5 - star rating!
Tricky to get into, But hey it’s mixed reality

developer_response.body:
Dear player, 
Thanks for the feedback. This is currently a very early access version. We're working on quite a bunch of new features and game modes in coming weeks, including build campaign mode, and race control mode, etc. We're also adding a few guidance feature to improve the building experience (so make it less tricky to start with). Please stay tuned, and we will definitely improve in coming versions.
